profile.setupSubtitle: Tell us who you are on the field
profile.title: Profile
profile.name: First Name

home.cancelLockMessage: Attendance cannot be cancelled within 24 hours of the match
home.joinTeamCta: Join a Team and start a league

league.title: Comuna League
league.subtitle: 10 clubs · regular season & playoffs
league.playoffsIntro: The top 4 advance. Semifinals are played over two legs (home and away); the final is a single match. A draw is settled on penalties.
league.finalLocked: The final unlocks once both semifinals are decided.
league.playoffsLocked: Playoffs unlock when the regular season ends.
league.fixturesLocked: Fixtures are generated once the league fills up.
league.noTeam: Create or join a team to enter a league.

team.noTeam: You're not on a team yet
team.noTeamSub: Create your own or join an existing one
team.joinRequestSentMessage: Your request to join "{{name}}" was sent to the captain.
team.alreadyRequestedMessage: You already requested to join "{{name}}". Wait for the captain's response.
team.alreadyMemberMessage: You are already a member of "{{name}}". You must leave that team first.
team.cantCreateAlreadyMember: You can't create a team while you belong to one. Leave your current team first.
team.leaveTeamConfirmMessage: If you leave "{{name}}" and want to rejoin it or join another team, you will need to pay the registration fee again.
team.leaveTeamOwnerMessage: The captain cannot leave the team. Transfer ownership or delete the team first.
team.makeCaptainOnlyMessage: Only the captain can transfer leadership to another player.
team.transferMessage: {{name}} will become the new captain of the team.
team.deleteTeamMessage: This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
team.deleteTeamHasMembers: The team still has members. All players must leave before the team can be deleted. If you need help, contact us at comunaleagueau@gmail.com.
team.deleteTeamHasMatches: The team cannot be deleted because it has scheduled matches. Please contact us at comunaleagueau@gmail.com to proceed.
team.needPlayerMessage: Your request will be visible to all solo players looking for a one-time match. Multiple players can apply.
team.cancelPlayerRequestMessage: Your team's player request will be removed.
team.needPlayerCaptainOnlyMessage: Only the captain can request extra players for a match.
team.joinFlowNotice: To join "{{name}}", you pay {{coins}} coins now and the captain reviews your request. If the captain doesn't accept you, your coins are returned to your wallet.
team.cancelPlayerRequestCaptainOnlyMessage: Only the captain can cancel this request.
team.cancelRequestHasPendingMessage: There's a player waiting for your response. Accept or reject their application before cancelling the request.

match.title: Matches
match.noTeamForSchedule: Join or create a team to see your schedule

inbox.title: Inbox
inbox.noTeam: Join a team to message your teammates
inbox.noTeammates: No other players on your team yet

guest.tagline: Organize and join amateur soccer tournaments
guest.loginPrompt: Sign in to access all features

onegame.title: Play Solo
onegame.subtitle: Join a daily match as an individual player
onegame.confirmMsg: Once you register you won't be able to cancel your spot. Are you sure you want to join?
onegame.applyMessage: Once you apply you won't be able to cancel your request. Are you sure you want to apply?
onegame.alreadyInMatch: You're already playing in this match
onegame.dailyMatchHeader: Daily match created by Comuna League
onegame.noRequests: No teams looking for a player

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.pushDesc: Receive alerts for matches and messages
notifications.playerInterest: {{name}} wants to play in your next match
notifications.playerRejected: Your request was not accepted this time. Your coins were returned to your wallet.
notifications.joinAccepted: Your request to join the team was accepted!
notifications.joinRejected: Your request to join the team was not accepted this time. Your coins were returned to your wallet.
notifications.joinCaptainOnlyMessage: Only the captain can accept or reject this request.

payment.title: Payment
payment.subtitle: Review and confirm your payment
payment.successCoins: {{coins}} coins were added to your wallet.

coins.title: Comuna Coins
coins.subtitle: Buy coins to use across the app
coins.note: Coins are used to create teams, join teams, register for daily matches and apply to matches. If a captain doesn't accept you, your coins are returned to your wallet.
coins.insufficientMessage: You don't have enough Comuna Coins for this. Buy more to continue.
